name: Easy Salmon Burgers with Honey Barbecue Sauce-NHB
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine honey, ketchup, cider vinegar, horseradish, minced garlic, and crushed red pepper flakes until well blended. Set aside half of the sauce.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together salmon, bread crumbs, chopped onion, green bell pepper, and egg white. Blend in 2 tablespoons of the sauce.
3. Divide the salmon mixture into two patties, each about 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick.
4. Place the patties on an oiled grill set 4 to 6 inches from hot coals. Grill, turning and basting with sauce 2 to 3 times until burgers are browned and cooked through. Alternatively, place patties on a lightly greased baking sheet and broil 4 to 6 inches from the heat source, turning and basting with sauce 2 to 3 times until cooked through.
5. Place patties on toasted hamburger buns and serve with reserved sauce.
[2 servings: Per Serving: Calories: 609 Sodium: 1059 mg Carbohydrates: 101 g Protein: 31.0 g Cholesterol: 58.5 mg Dietary Fiber: 3.4 g Total Fat: 10.3 g Cal. from Fat: 15%]
